name: hackernews-reader
description: Search and read Hacker News stories, comments, and discussions via the Algolia and Firebase APIs

tools.name: search_hn
tools.description: Full-text search across Hacker News stories and comments

tools.name: get_hn_top_stories
tools.description: Get current top, best, new, ask, or show stories from Hacker News

tools.name: get_hn_item
tools.description: Get a specific Hacker News item (story or comment) by ID
